rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_intro: The Reward Road is a monthly reward program where every month, Trainers can earn Reward Points with eligible purchases on the Pokémon GO Web Store or in-game shop* Earn a certain amount of Reward Points to increase the Reward Road level and unlock rewards!
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_bulle: Make a purchase on the Pokémon GO Web Store or in-game shop to earn Reward Points*
Earn enough Reward Points and Trainers can unlock rewards
Visit the Pokémon GO Web Store to claim unlocked rewards**
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_aster: *Please note that purchases must be made with real money. Purchases made using PokéCoins will not grant Reward Points.
**Rewards can be claimed on the Pokémon GO Web Store when a Trainer is logged into their Pokémon GO account. An account must be in good standing to claim Rewards.
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_body1: Each Reward Road lasts for one calendar month. Reward Points and Reward Road levels will reset on the last day of the month at 11:59 PM UTC so be sure to claim your rewards before the end of the month!***
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_body2: While Trainers can earn Reward Points in the Pokémon GO app, Trainers receive additional points for purchases within the Pokémon GO Web Store.
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_aster: ***Please note, Reward Points expire at the end of the calendar month. Even if a Trainer claims every reward, Reward Points will not carry over between months. Trainers using child accounts are not eligible to participate in the Rewards Road program. Reward Points are not cash or any other currency, and are non-transferable between accounts. Reward Road program availability and terms are subject to change.
rewarded_spend.congrats_claimed_rewards: Congrats! You’ve claimed all the milestone rewards offered during this period!

rewarded_spend.info_dialog_title: Get rewards for purchasing from the web store!

rewarded_spend.reward_for_signing_in: Here's your reward for signing in for the first time.
rewarded_spend.sign_in_reward_footer: *This reward only applies to first time sign ins.
rewarded_spend.sign_in_for_first_time: Sign in for the first time to claim bonus rewards!
rewarded_spend.only_once_per_account: *This bonus reward can only be claimed once per account

快去看看 Web Store 或 Pokémon GO 禮品卡。如有購買品項符合條件，即可獲得額外的獎勵寶可幣。
offer_redemption.offer_sign_in_faq_note: 請留意，可能會有無法於本網頁使用的宣傳代碼。僅記載著可於本網頁使用的宣傳代碼才可使用，還請確認宣傳代碼的使用條件。若有不明白之處，請參照<1>宣傳代碼相關FAQ</1>。
offer_redemption.offer_sign_in_note: 使用宣傳代碼時，需先登入Pokémon GO帳號。請下載應用程式後建立遊戲帳號。若有不明白之處，請參照<1>宣傳代碼相關FAQ</1>。
offer_redemption.redeem_error_invalid: 此為無效的禮品卡代碼或促銷代碼，或者您不符合促銷活動資格。
offer_redemption.gift_card_unavailable: Pokémon GO 禮品卡兌換功能暫時無法使用。請稍後再試。
offer_redemption.gift_card_sign_in_note: 請登入您的《Pokémon GO》帳號來兌換優惠或禮品卡代碼。欲兌換這些代碼，您必須先登入您的《Pokémon GO》帳號。若要註冊帳號，請下載應用程式。如有任何疑問，<1>請參閱代碼兌換常見問題</1>或<3>《Pokémon GO》禮品卡常見問題</3>。
offer_redemption.gift_card_sign_in_faq_note: 請注意，並非所有優惠代碼都能於本網頁兌換。只有特別註明可在本網頁兌換的優惠代碼，才可於上方兌換，還請確認兌換優惠或禮品卡的使用條件。兌換禮品卡即代表您同意（若您未滿18歲，則為您的父母或監護人同意）Niantic的服務條款及禮品卡條款與細則。若有任何疑問，<1>請參閱代碼兌換常見問題</1>或<3>《Pokémon GO》禮品卡常見問題</3>。
offer_redemption.gift_card_sign_in_faq_note_updated: 請注意，並非所有優惠代碼都能於本網頁兌換。只有特別註明可在本網頁兌換的優惠代碼，才可於上方兌換，還請確認兌換優惠或禮品卡的使用條件。兌換禮品卡即代表您同意（若您未滿18歲，則為您的父母或監護人同意）<1>Niantic的服務條款</1> 及<3>禮品卡條款與細則（英文）</3>。若有任何疑問，<5>請參閱代碼兌換常見問題</5> 或<7>《Pokémon GO》禮品卡常見問題</7> 。

banner.message: 首次於Web Store購買任何9.99美元（含）以上的道具，即可享85折優惠！
banner.message_jp: 首次於Web Store購買任何¥1,400（含）以上的道具，即可享85折優惠！

rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_intro: 「獎勵之路」是每月獎勵系統，訓練家於每月在Pokémon GO Web Store或遊戲內商店*消費達到特定條件，就可以獲得「獎勵點數」。累積一定數量的獎勵點數，提高獎勵之路等級，就能解鎖獎勵！
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_bulle: 在Pokémon GO Web Store或遊戲內商店消費來獲得獎勵點數*
獲得足夠的獎勵點數，訓練家就能解鎖獎勵
前往Pokémon GO Web Store領取解鎖的獎勵吧**
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_aster: * 請注意，必須使用現實貨幣消費才能獲得獎勵點數。使用寶可幣消費則無法獲得點數。
** 登入《Pokémon GO》帳號後，訓練家可以在Pokémon GO Web Store領取獎勵。無重大不良紀錄的帳號才能取得獎勵。
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_body1: 每次獎勵之路將會持續1個月，獎勵點數和獎勵之路等級將會在台灣時間每月第1天的07:59重置，所以請在下個月開始前取得你的獎勵！***
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_body2: 雖然訓練家可以在《Pokémon GO》遊戲內商店的消費中取得獎勵點數，但在Pokémon GO Web Store消費可以取得額外的獎勵點數。
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_aster: *** 請注意，獎勵點數會於台灣時間每月第1天重置。就算訓練家已經取得所有獎勵，也無法將獎勵點數保存到下個月。使用兒童帳號的訓練家無法參與獎勵之路。獎勵點數並非現金或任何貨幣，且無法轉移到其他帳號。獎勵之路的相關規定與條款可能會有所變動。
rewarded_spend.congrats_claimed_rewards: 恭喜！你已獲得本次獎勵之路的所有里程碑獎勵！
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_timer: 本次獎勵之路將於{{date}}日{{time}}重置。
rewarded_spend.claim_error_try_again: 領取獎勵時發生錯誤。請再試一次
rewarded_spend.info_dialog_title: 從Web Store購買商品，即可取得獎勵！
rewarded_spend.monthly_cap: 您已達到等級獎勵點數的每月上限。在重設前，趕快領取獎勵吧！

rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_intro: The Reward Road is a monthly reward program where every month, Trainers can earn Reward Points with eligible purchases on the Pokémon GO Web Store or in-game shop* Earn a certain amount of Reward Points to increase the Reward Road level and unlock rewards!
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_bulle: Make a purchase on the Pokémon GO Web Store or in-game shop to earn Reward Points*
Earn enough Reward Points and Trainers can unlock rewards
Visit the Pokémon GO Web Store to claim unlocked rewards**
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_aster: *Please note that purchases must be made with real money. Purchases made using PokéCoins will not grant Reward Points.
**Rewards can be claimed on the Pokémon GO Web Store when a Trainer is logged into their Pokémon GO account. An account must be in good standing to claim Rewards.
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_body1: Each Reward Road lasts for one calendar month. Reward Points and Reward Road levels will reset on the last day of the month at 11:59 PM UTC so be sure to claim your rewards before the end of the month!***
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_body2: While Trainers can earn Reward Points in the Pokémon GO app, Trainers receive additional points for purchases within the Pokémon GO Web Store.
rewarded_spend.rewarded_spend_information_message_aster: ***Please note, Reward Points expire at the end of the calendar month. Even if a Trainer claims every reward, Reward Points will not carry over between months. Trainers using child accounts are not eligible to participate in the Rewards Road program. Reward Points are not cash or any other currency, and are non-transferable between accounts. Reward Road program availability and terms are subject to change.
rewarded_spend.congrats_claimed_rewards: Congrats! You’ve claimed all the milestone rewards offered during this period!
rewarded_spend.server_error_description: There was an error fetching data.
rewarded_spend.claim_error_try_again: Error claiming reward. Please try again.
rewarded_spend.info_dialog_title: Get rewards for purchasing from the web store!
rewarded_spend.monthly_cap: You have reached the monthly level earning cap. Claim your rewards before they reset!
rewarded_spend.reward_for_signing_in: Here's your reward for signing in for the first time.
rewarded_spend.sign_in_reward_footer: *This reward only applies to first time sign ins.
rewarded_spend.sign_in_for_first_time: Sign in for the first time to claim bonus rewards!
rewarded_spend.only_once_per_account: *This bonus reward can only be claimed once per account

email.heading: Email Address (optional)
email.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.

sbps_settings.credit_card_settings: SB Payment Service allows you to store credit card data in order to expedite your payment process.
sbps_settings.no_paypay_login: You are not logged in to PayPay.
sbps_settings.no_stored_card: You don't have stored credit card info.
sbps_settings.paypay_settings: PayPay sessions will time out after 30 days. You may end your PayPay session early and sign out.
sbps_settings.redirection_notice_note: You are being redirected to {{redirectURL}} to delete stored credit card information. If you wish to cancel, you can return to payment settings page.

sbps_review.redirection_notice_note: You are being redirected to {{redirectURL}} to complete your payment. If you wish to cancel, you can return to selecting your payment method.
sbps_review.signout_paypay_fail: Failed to sign out of PayPay.
sbps_review.terms_of_service: By proceeding, I confirm I am an adult and agree to <1>Niantic's Terms of Service</1> and <3>Privacy Policy</3>.
